A '''starfighter''' was flown by [[Oss Wilum]] when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] raided [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]] in an attempt to redeem [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]].<ref name="TOTJ6" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] {{1st}}
